calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-20-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing. Case was continued to today by Department 501. On Tuesday October 14, 2014 Trial Date. (Court clerks were on strike and Department 514 was not in session).
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Michael C. Hall, Esq., for the Plaintiff MILDRED ROSE.
Plaintiff Mildred Rose sworn and examined of her own behalf.
Defendants Does 1 to 10 dismissed without prejudice.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant TWrennMadison Krane fka Terry A. Kirchner.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1037 Ocean Avenue, #2, San Francisco, CA 94112.

Damages $1208.00
Holdover damages $2,541.50
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $510.00
for a Total Judgment of $4,259.50
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-14-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Line 4

Judge Pro Tem: Barb Anscher; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D502B)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mildred Rose is present.
Attorney Michael C. Hall, Esq. of M.C. Hall & Associated (415-512-9865), counsel for the plaintiff.
Defendant Twrenn Madison Krane is present.
Attorney Irina Naduhovskaya, Esq. of Bay Area Legal Aid (415-982-1300 x6333), appears as counsel for defendant in limited scope

Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Room 502B, re settlement discussions. The case is NOT settled. The trial date of OCT-14-2014 remains on calendar.
